1846410.name: Gates of Siberia: Wildlands
1846410.description:
Dive into the world of extreme road trips with the “Gates of Siberia” club!

Forget about beaten paths and boring routes. “Gates of Siberia” invites you to exciting car tours for survival in the wildest and most unpredictable corners of our planet. Are you ready to test your strength and see the world from a different perspective?

You will find:

  • Endless expanses: Explore huge, realistically recreated locations based on real geographic locations. Dynamic weather and changing time of day will make each trip a unique challenge.

  • Living world: Immerse yourself in the life of local communities, completing an endless stream of generated tasks. Uncover unique stories created for each location, and help those who need your help.

  • The thirst for speed and excitement: Take part in exciting races and competitions, testing your driving skills on a variety of vehicles. Win and prove that you are the best!

  • Your own travel diary: Keep your own travel blog, share your impressions and inspire others to adventure. Tell stories about helping locals, searching for resources, exploring the world, participating in competitions and visiting attractions. The more extreme your adventures, the more subscribers and profits you will receive!

  • A fleet for every taste: Choose your ideal car from a huge selection. Use your favorite car from the garage or rent equipment from the "Gates of Siberia" club. From simple and unpretentious SUVs to serious military equipment - we have everything you need to survive in the harshest conditions.

  • Not only on the roads: Explore the world not only on land, but also on water! Some locations are accessible only by land or only by water transport, while in others you will need both types of equipment.

  • Tuning to the limit: Improve your cars, change characteristics and add new features. Turn your transport into the perfect survival machine.

  • Become a better person: Gain invaluable experience in each expedition and use it to develop your personal qualities and acquire new skills.

  • Trade and survive: Exchange resources with locals to get everything you need to survive. Look for profitable deals and get rid of unnecessary things.

“Gates of Siberia” is not just a journey, it is a challenge to yourself. Discover a world of adventures that you will never forget!
1846410.supported_languages:
英语, 俄语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
